response: Founded in 1861, the Massachusetts Institute of Technology (MIT) holds the #1 ranking and educates approximately 11,500 students under the guidance of 1,069 faculty members, boasting an impressive 98 Nobel laureates among its affiliates. With a highly selective acceptance rate of just 3.9% and an annual tuition of $57,590, the university is supported by a substantial endowment of $24.6 billion.
